title: lasiobema scandens var. horsfieldii
intro: Lasiobema scandens var. horsfieldii, also known as Chinese dragon's blood, is a variety of plant that belongs to the Lasiobema genus. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chinese dragon's blood include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Chinese dragon's blood is often used in the form of capsules, teas, or tinctures, and its resin is also used as a natural dye.
